positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a whimsical forest scene viewed from a high angle, featuring simplified silhouettes of diverse flora (giant mushrooms, fern clusters) and fauna (stylized deer, woodland birds). The color palette is restricted to deep emerald green, burnt sienna, ivory white, and midnight navy, offering high contrast and excellent readability on fabric. The style should be a blend of Art Deco geometry and modern Scandinavian line art, emphasizing crisp edges and negative space. Composition must be centered and cyclical, designed to wrap around an object (e.g., shirt or tote bag). Perfect for apparel print, clean lines, vector art quality, no excessive detail or photo realism. High contrast, bold graphic design, flat graphic style.
negative: photorealistic, CGI, blur, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, artifact, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly rendered, low detail, low contrast, gradients, shadows, depth of field
